zones.message: Importing components is forbidden from ts/{util,types}

restrict.message: No arbitrary hex values
No arbitrary rgb values
No arbitrary hsl values
No !important modifiers
No child variants
Use logical property left-* instead of start-*

Use logical property ml-* instead of ms-*
Use logical property mr-* instead of me-*
Use logical property pl-* instead of ps-*
Use logical property pr-* instead of pe-*

Use logical property rounded-e-* instead of rounded-r-*

Use logical property rounded-ee-* instead of rounded-br-*

Use logical property text-end instead of text-right
Use logical property float-start instead of float-left
Use logical property float-end instead of float-right
